title: Leo's Bakery
blurb: Multiplication, equal groups, and missing factor

help.howToPlay: Build trays, find total or missing factor, or rearrange the same total — then tap "Check Order".
help.scoring: Correct answer +30, time bonus up to +20, streak of 5 correct +25. After 3 failed attempts the full solution is shown.
help.rewards: Coins are awarded based on how many orders you prepared correctly, accuracy, streaks, and difficulty level.
help.tip: Think about how many trays × how many per tray — not just counting icons.
